title: jk's weapons and tools
description: jk's weapons and tools texture pack. changes the textures of all weapons and tools except iron (and hoes), along with a bonus rainbow golden apple texture
body:
a small texture pack that changes the following textures:
- wooden tools (not hoe) to a more crude look
- wooden axe to a staff with a small earth at the end (for worldedit)
- stone tools (not hoe) also to a crude, caveman-era look
- gold tools (not hoe) to a more sleek look
- diamond tools (not hoe) to a sharper, cooler-looking look
- netherite tools to the same as diamond
- makes golden apples rainbow
